Home / Projects / Lakeland Retail Center
Project Type Retail Construction
Location Auburn, WA
Sector Commercial Retail

Lakeland Retail Center

The Lakeland Retail Center project represents the kind of versatile, functional retail construction that serves as the backbone of community commerce. Located in Auburn, Washington, this multi-tenant retail development required careful coordination to deliver individual spaces that work independently while maintaining cohesive design and shared infrastructure.

Our team managed the complete construction process, from site preparation and utility coordination through structural build-out and individual tenant space preparation. The project demanded attention to retail-specific requirements including prominent storefront visibility, efficient parking and access patterns, and MEP systems designed to accommodate diverse tenant needs.

Working in Auburn's competitive retail corridor, we delivered a facility that balances durability with attractive presentation—a space where businesses can thrive and customers feel welcomed. The project showcases our ability to handle multi-tenant retail construction with the coordination and quality finishes that make commercial spaces succeed.

Project Highlights

  • Multi-tenant retail center with flexible space configuration
  • Modern storefront design with excellent visibility and curb appeal
  • Coordinated utility infrastructure serving multiple tenant spaces
  • Efficient site layout maximizing parking and traffic flow
  • Quality commercial finishes designed for retail demands
  • On-schedule delivery enabling timely tenant move-ins

The Lakeland Retail Center stands as another example of Northway Construction's commitment to delivering practical, well-built commercial spaces that serve businesses and communities for decades to come.

Planning a Retail Construction Project?

Let's discuss how we can deliver the same quality and attention to detail for your retail development.
